title: rubus acutispinis
intro: Rubus acutispinis, also known as the Sharp-toothed Bramble or Mountain Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus acutispinis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
